name: tiered-private-skills-paywall
title: Tiered private skills — paid unlocks private + clear UI distinction
summary: Free tier = public skills only; paying via Stripe (Pro/Team) unlocks connecting private repos and publishing private skills. Adds a privacy chooser to the Skill Studio publish flow, surfaces a clear private/public visual distinction across Studio + platform UI, wires the upgrade paywall to a real Stripe checkout, and finishes the open ACs of increment 0848.
